role: Cognitive core — PPAC loop, MCP client, persistent memory
completed: Full PPAC decision loop (Proposer, Predictor, Accumulator, Actor, Critic)
MCP client with discovery and runtime calling
CLI commands (ai brain, ai status, ai mcp list)

pending.subject: Implement RPE telemetry and structured logging
pending.description: For every PPAC cycle, log inputs, proposer options, predictor valence, accumulator trace, actor decision, critic RPE, and external outcome. Store in telemetry/ directory with daily summaries. **Critical for learning:** Without telemetry, RPE computation produces no actionable data for QLoRA fine-tuning or threshold tuning.
acceptance: Each decision produces a structured telemetry record
Record includes all PPAC stage outputs
Records are append-only JSONL with daily rotation

pending.subject: Add ai rpe --analyze CLI command
pending.description: Expose a CLI subcommand that reads telemetry logs and produces analysis: average RPE per region, learning trend, high-|RPE| events, and suggestions for threshold tuning.
acceptance: Command runs without errors on existing telemetry
Output is human-readable with key metrics

pending.subject: Implement prototype ingestion workflow integration
pending.description: Integrate with ASD's prototype scanner. Cerebro Proposer should read the shortlist, rank candidates by expected value, and post the top-5 suggestion to the ADHD bus. Include rationale and dependency check.
acceptance: Proposer can query ASD for prototype shortlist via MCP
Suggestion includes rationale and dependency mapping
Result posted to bus with type=dependency or type=status

pending.subject: Export preference-pair datasets for QLoRA
pending.description: From telemetry and memory, generate preference-pair datasets (chosen vs rejected options with RPE signals) suitable for QLoRA fine-tuning. Save to memory/qlora-pairs/.
acceptance: Pairs include prompt, chosen, rejected, and RPE signal
Format compatible with standard QLoRA training scripts

pending.subject: Improve MCP discoverability and resilience
pending.description: Add health checks, version negotiation, and fallback when drivers are missing. Implement ai mcp status --extended with visual summary and auto-retry registration.
acceptance: Client detects missing MCP servers and degrades gracefully
Extended status shows server health, version, and last seen
Auto-retry with exponential backoff on transient failures

pending.subject: Add outcome recording CLI hook
pending.description: After an agent completes a task (PR merged, tests pass, manual review), provide ai rpe record --outcome <value> to close the RPE loop explicitly. This drives real learning.
